title: dasyglossum verrucosum
intro: Dasyglossum verrucosum, also known as the Verrucous Lip Fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasyglossum verrucosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Dasyglossum verrucosum is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
